# SSH密钥信息

**生成时间**: 2026-03-19 05:12
**GitHub仓库**: https://github.com/xuanji-ai-2026/learnlanguage
**用途**: 汉越语学习工具v2.0部署

## 公钥内容（添加到GitHub）

```
ssh-rsa  deploy@kuncanyun.com
```

## 密钥指纹

```
4096 SHA256:7U3/CzypfrGMht9hJ2PXoSEwek+BF+OAQmj4qG7vApU deploy@kuncanyun.com (RSA)
```

## 添加步骤

1. 登录GitHub: https://github.com/xuanji-ai-2026/learnlanguage
2. Settings → Deploy keys → Add deploy key
3. 标题：汉越语v2.0部署密钥
4. 粘贴上方公钥内容
5. 勾选 "Allow write access"
6. 点击 "Add key"
